raw_text:
Nexus Cloud Labs // Senior DevOps Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-Friendly) | Full-Time | $165,000 - $215,000 USD per annum

Enterprise infrastructure automation for the modern cloud era

>> ABOUT

Nexus Cloud Labs is a fast-growing cloud infrastructure and automation company
specializing in helping enterprises migrate to, manage, and optimize their cloud

environments. Founded in 2018, we serve Fortune 500 companies across finance, healthcare,
and e-commerce sectors, providing turnkey DevOps solutions and managed infrastructure

services. Our team of 150+ engineers is committed to building the most reliable,
scalable, and automated cloud platforms on the market.

>> SUMMARY

We're seeking an experienced Senior DevOps Engineer to lead infrastructure modernization
initiatives and mentor junior team members at Nexus Cloud Labs. In this role, you'll

architect and implement cloud infrastructure solutions, manage Kubernetes deployments at
scale, and drive operational excellence across our platform. You'll work with AWS and

GCP, design CI/CD pipelines, and ensure 99.9%+ uptime for mission-critical systems
serving thousands of users globally.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Design, implement, and maintain highly available Kubernetes clusters on AWS and GCP,
handling thousands of containerized workloads across production environments

- Architect infrastructure-as-code solutions using Terraform and CloudFormation,
managing infrastructure versioning and change management across multiple cloud

providers
- Lead the development and optimization of CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and

Jenkins, reducing deployment time by 40%+ and improving release velocity
- Mentor and code-review junior DevOps engineers, establishing best practices for

infrastructure automation, security, and monitoring
- Develop and maintain comprehensive monitoring, logging, and alerting systems using

Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack to ensure system reliability and performance
- Collaborate with security and compliance teams to implement infrastructure security

controls, automated compliance scanning, and disaster recovery procedures
- Conduct root cause analysis on production incidents, implement permanent fixes, and

share learnings across the engineering organization
- Drive infrastructure cost optimization initiatives, analyzing cloud spend and

implementing resource optimization strategies that reduce operational costs by 20%+
annually

>> MUST HAVE

- 5-8 years of professional DevOps, cloud infrastructure, or SRE experience
- Advanced proficiency with Kubernetes administration, including cluster design,

networking, storage, and troubleshooting in production environments
- Strong hands-on experience with Docker containerization and container orchestration

at scale
- Proficiency with Infrastructure-as-Code tools, specifically Terraform and/or

CloudFormation, with experience managing multi-environment deployments

 - Demonstrable experience with AWS or GCP (or both) including VPCs, RDS, S3, EC2, IAM,

or equivalent GCP services
- Advanced scripting skills in Bash and Python for automation, tooling, and

infrastructure management

>> NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with both AWS and GCP multi-cloud strategies

- Proven experience implementing and managing Jenkins or GitHub Actions for enterprise
CI/CD pipelines

- Knowledge of observability practices including Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, or
Datadog

- Experience with GitOps methodologies and ArgoCD or Flux
- AWS Solutions Architect or Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) certification

>> STACK

Kubernetes (K8s) / Docker / Terraform / AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, VPC, IAM, Lambda, CloudFormation) /

Google Cloud Platform (GCP) (GKE, Compute Engine, Cloud Storage) / GitHub Actions / Jenkins /
Bash/Shell Scripting / Python / Prometheus & Grafana

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive health insurance: medical, dental, and vision coverage with 80% employer
contribution

- Generous paid time off: 20 days PTO + 10 company holidays + unlimited sick days
- Professional development budget: $3,000 annually for certifications, conferences,

and training
- Equity compensation: stock options with 4-year vesting for all full-time employees

- Fully remote-friendly with optional office access in San Francisco and Austin
- Annual performance bonus: 15-25% of base salary

- Comprehensive mental health support and 24/7 counseling services
- Commuter benefits and parking reimbursement for in-office days

>> APPLY

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and GitHub/GitLab profile (or portfolio of
infrastructure projects) to careers@nexuscloudlabs.com with the subject line 'Senior

DevOps Engineer Application'. You may also apply through our careers portal at
www.nexuscloudlabs.com/careers. Qualified candidates will be contacted within 5 business

days for an initial screening call.
